name: fehler
description: A comprehensive error reporting system for Zig

releases.name: v0.7.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features
* `feat: emitSarif now accepts *std.Io.Writer instead of *std.io.Writer for 0.16.0 compatibility`

### 🧱 Non-Breaking Changes
* updated `root.zig` for Zig 0.16.0 API
* migrated `std.array_list.Managed` to `std.ArrayList` with explicit allocator passing
* rewrote `emitSarif` JSON output using `std.json.fmt` (old streaming builder API removed)
* bumped `minimum_zig_version` to `0.16.0` in `build.zig.zon`
* updated GitHub Actions CI workflow to use Zig 0.16.0

### 📝 Documentation
* updated README to reflect Zig 0.16.0 changes and new `std.Io.Writer` requirement

releases.name: v0.6.1
releases.body:
### 🐛 Fixes
* fix: apply reserve first pattern to `addSource` method for strong exception safety 

*Thanks @matklad! & @KilianHanich*

releases.name: v0.6.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features
* `feat: emitSarif now requires an allocator argument for flexible memory management`

### 🧱 Non-Breaking Changes
* updated `root.zig` and `test.zig` for Zig 0.15.1 API
* removed unnecessary ArrayList capacity handling (defaults to unmanaged)
* bumped `minimum_zig_version` to 0.15.1
* updated GitHub Actions CI workflow to use Zig 0.15.1

### 📝 Documentation
* updated README to reflect Zig 0.15.1 changes and `emitSarif` allocator requirement

releases.name: v0.5.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features

* `feat: add emitSarif() function to export diagnostics in SARIF 2.1.0 JSON format`
* `feat: support writing SARIF output to any std.io.Writer for flexible integration`
* Include rule IDs, messages, and precise source locations in SARIF output
* Add tests verifying SARIF output correctness and structure
* Update README with SARIF usage examples and API documentation
* Add top-level module doc comment describing fehler library and features

### 🧱 Non-Breaking Changes

* Existing diagnostic reporting and formatting remain unchanged and opt-in
* SARIF export does not affect terminal output or other existing formats

### 📝 Documentation

* README updated to document `emitSarif` function and usage
* API reference expanded with SARIF export details

releases.name: v0.4.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features

* `feat: add new severity levels: fatal, todo, and unimplemented`

releases.name: v0.3.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features

* `feat: add support for GCC and MSVC output formats`
* `feat: add ErrorReporter.withFormat() for changing output style`
* Maintains `rich` (fehler-style) as the default diagnostic format
* GCC format mirrors `gcc`/`clang`-style diagnostics: `file:line:col: error: message`
* MSVC format follows `filename(line,col): error message` structure

### 🧱 Non-Breaking Changes

* `ErrorReporter.init()` signature remains unchanged for backward compatibility
* `.withFormat()` is now the preferred method to switch formats

### 🖼 Visuals

* Added `example_gcc.png` and `example_msvc.png` to showcase alternative output styles
* Rich format remains ANSI-colored and detailed

### 📝 Documentation

* Updated README to include `withFormat()` usage and output format examples
* API section now documents `OutputFormat` enum and visual differences across formats
* Screenshot references added for all output styles

releases.name: v0.2.0
releases.body:
### ✨ Features

* `feat: replace SourceLoc with Position and SourceRange for range support`
* Diagnostics now support multi-character ranges using `~` underlines
* Single-character errors still use `^`, both styled with severity color

### 💥 Breaking Changes

* Replaced `SourceLoc` with `Position` and `SourceRange` types
* `.withLocation(SourceLoc)` replaced by `.withLocation(file, line, column)` or `.withRange(SourceRange)`

### 🖼 Visuals

* Caret (`^`) and tilde (`~`) now use the same color as the diagnostic severity
* Updated `example.png` to showcase new highlighting style

### 📝 Documentation

* Updated README examples and API reference to reflect new range-based API
* Clarified migration examples from `v0.1.0` to current version

releases.name: v0.1.0
releases.body: ### ✨ Features * `feat: implement core error reporting system` * `feat: add error code and URL support to Diagnostic` ### 📝 Documentation * Embedded `example.png` in README to preview output * Added fallback `` tag for compatibility with external renderers (e.g. zigistry.dev) * Expanded API reference in README to include `.code` and `.url` support ### 🛠 CI * Setup GitHub Actions for Zig 0.14.1 compatibility and builds
